_README: Single source of truth for outbound-text authoring rules, enforced by scripts/lint_outbound_text.py. 'Outbound' = any text that leaves in the operator's voice: PR/issue comments, commit messages, emails, release notes. This file exists so the rules are a fail-closed GATE checked at draft time, NOT a fact recalled from memory (which has a non-zero miss rate by construction — see the session audit 2026-06-25). Edit here to change the rules; do not hard-code style preferences anywhere else.

forbidden_glyphs.name: em dash (U+2014)
forbidden_glyphs.reason: operator dislikes em dashes in outbound text

forbidden_patterns.name: spaced double-hyphen used as an em dash
spaced en dash used as an em dash (unspaced ranges like 2024–2025 are allowed)
